entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop that serves as a common host for aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN
entities.description: Toxic compounds that contaminate groundnut and groundnut-based products, posing health and trade risks.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where groundnut is grown and aflatoxin contamination is a significant issue.

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where crops are grown relying on rainfall.

entities.name: KULI KULI
entities.description: A groundnut-based product consumed in Nigeria that is frequently contaminated by aflatoxins.

entities.name: GOOD AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural techniques implemented to manage and reduce aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL METHODS
entities.description: Evolving methods using biological agents to manage aflatoxin contamination.
